package rulecoverage

func NegativeFileOrTemplateReadPerRequest() string {
    ruleID := "file_or_template_read_per_request"
    family := "gin"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Request-path handlers that read files directly instead of using startup caching or dedicated file-serving paths."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
